Catalog/Endo Surgery/Merineum Hernia Mesh
Endo SurgeryREF: MRL-ENDO-006

Merineum Hernia Mesh

FILAPROP · Hernia Mesh

Polypropylene hernia mesh. Available in standard and soft variants.

MaterialPolypropylene (PP)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Lightweight polypropylene mesh for hernia repair procedures. Available in flat and 3D configurations for inguinal, ventral, and incisional hernia repairs.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Merineum Hernia Mesh, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Merineum Hernia Mesh is constructed using Polypropylene (PP), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
